mapper.sql: user_id, username, password, real_name, phone, role_type, credit_score, status, create_time, level_id, growth_value
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.username, u.real_name AS realName, u.phone, u.role_type AS roleType, u.credit_score AS creditScore, u.status, u.create_time AS createTime, mi.store_name AS storeName, mi.store_logo AS storeLogo, mi.store_notice AS storeNotice, mi.rating, mi.monthly_sales AS monthlySales, mi.delivery_fee AS deliveryFee, mi.delivery_time AS deliveryTime, mi.min_order_amount AS minOrderAmount, mi.business_status AS businessStatus FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN merchant_info mi ON mi.merchant_id = u.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
